description: Payment processing microservice with REST API

security_issues.technical_details: Payment lookup uses user-supplied ID without verifying ownership, allowing access to other users' payment records.
security_issues.cwe_id: CWE-639: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key

security_issues.technical_details: Refund operations are not logged, making it impossible to audit or detect fraudulent refund activity.

risk_justification: IDOR vulnerability on payment endpoint poses significant risk to data confidentiality.
